title: Constitution of the District Level Review Committee for implementation of the Solid Waste Management Rules, 2026

Disaster Management & Rehabilitation Minister Prof. Lalnilawma hovin DM&R official te leh district tina bawrhsap ten Furpui lo theng turin a chhiatrupna lo thlen thulh a hmalak dan tur sawihona meeting an nei.
content:
559/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, 15th May, 2026: Vawiin chawhnu khan Chief Secretary Conference Hall, Mizoram Secretariat Building No.1, MINECO-ah Disaster Management & Rehabilitation (DM&R) Department changtu Minister Prof. Lalnilawma kaihhruaina hnuaiah DM&R official te leh District tin Bawrhsap te chuan kan hma lawka furpui lo thleng  turin chhiatrupna leh harsatna hrang hrang a thlen thlulh a,kan inpuahchahna leh a kaihhnawih thil pawimawh hrang hrangte sawihona meeting an nei a. He meeting-ah hian Aizawl district tiam lovin, District danga Bawrhsap te chuan Video Conferencing kal tlangin meeting hi an chhim a ni.

Minister chuan Bawrhsap zawng zawng te  nen Furpui lo thleng tur tinzawna, a chhiatna leh harsatna hrang hrang lo thleng theih tur laka lo inpuahchah dan tur leh lo inven lawk dan tur te, chhiatna lo thlen thulh a, a tihziaawm tura hmalak dan te sawihona meeting kan neih theih hi ka lawm hle a ni, a ti. District-a chhiatna a lo thlen palh pawha rang taka pui turin sawrkar chu an in buatsaih reng thu  sawiin, District hrang hrangte report  aṭangin Minister chuan district ten District Focal Person neih te, Department District Monsoon Action Plan neih te leh Resource Assessment neih te chu ṭha a tih thu a sawi tel bawk a ni. Minister chuan fur hun hmaa inbuatsaih lawkna, department hrang hrang thawhhona leh chhiatna hlauhawm a thlen pawha rang tak hmalak a pawimawhzia sawiin, mipui himna turin hmalakna chak zawk neih chu a ngaih pawimawh thu a sawi. Minister chuan kan ṭanrual chuan he furpui lo thleng tur hi kan hmachhawn thei ang, a ti.

Vawiin meeting-ah hian DM&R , Secretary leh Commissioner ni bawk Pu Udit Prakash Rai chuan Mizoram sawrkarin tun thlaruk chhunga DM&R hnuaia hmalakna pawimawh zualte a tarlang a- National Landslide Risk Mitigation Project - district pali (Aizawl, Saiha, Serchhip leh Champhai) a neih mek te, National Earthquake Risk Mitigation Project - district pali ( Lunglei, Saiha, Champhai leh Aizawl) a neih mek te leh Post Disaster Need Assesment chu Mizoram chhungah kalpui a nih thu a sawi a. Hmanni lawka tlangzarh  “Khuarel App” hmangin mipui mimir pawhin chhiatna thleng te an report zung zung thei tawh thu leh mipui ten kan  hman ṭangkai a ṭul thu  a tarlang bawk.

Vawiina ṭhuthonaah hian furpui lo thleng tura district hrang hrang te in buatsaihna leh SDRF/SDMF hnuaia an hmalakna tawhna leh hmachhawp hrang hrang te,  Monitoring an kalpui dan te leh SDRF/SDMF hman dan tura project bawhzui hmasak tur(Prioritize) ruahman dan tur te leh rualkhai zawka  hmalak dan tur sawiho a ni a.  District Bawrhsap leh District Disaster Management Authority Chairman ni bawk te chuan an District chhunga an hmalak tawhna leh hmachhawp te report  pein, an harsatna hrang hrang leh thurawn an nei te pawh an sawi bawk a ni.Heng bakah hian disaster risk reduction, emergency response preparedness leh district administration-te thawhhona tihchak chungchangte sawiho niin, Bawrhsapte chuan an district-a disaster resilience   tichak tur leh mipui himna tura theitawp chhuaha hma an lak chhunzawm mek zel thu an tarlang bawk.

Vawiin ṭhutkhawmnaah hian DM&R  dept. atanagin Secretary & Commissioner Pu Udit Prakash Rai, DM&R Director Pu Chuauhnuna, DM&R officials  dang te leh ADDMA aiawh te  bakaha district tin a bawrhsap ten video conference kaltlangin kokim takin he meeting hi an chhim a ni.

title: UNION MINISTER OF STATE FOR CONSUMER AFFAIRS, FOOD & PUBLIC DISTRIBUTION HOLDS REVIEW MEETING ON GOVERNMENT INITIATIVES
content:
84/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, 15th May, 2026 :Union Minister of State for Consumer Affairs, Food and Public Distribution, Smt. Nimuben Jayantibhai Bambhaniya, chaired a review  meeting on various government initiatives at the DC Conference Hall this afternoon.

The Minister remarked that Mizoram is a beautiful state with disciplined and well-mannered people, and also praised the clean environment of the state. She stated that under the leadership of Prime Minister Shri Narendra Modi, the Central Government is working to ensure that development and welfare benefits reach every village, every household, and every citizen across India. She further said that the Central Government gives special importance to the North-Eastern states and continues to work actively towards strengthening development infrastructure and ensuring welfare benefits for the people.

Smt. Nimuben Jayantibhai Bambhaniya emphasized the need for greater efforts to ensure that more beneficiaries receive the benefits of various government schemes. In this regard, she highlighted the importance of creating awareness among the public and also stressed the important role of youth in the development of the nation.

Deputy Commissioner of Khawzawl, Pu K. Vanlalthiana, expressed gratitude for the Minister’s visit and invited all attendees to join the cultural programme and dinner hosted at the DC Bungalow in honour of the Union Minister of State. Presentations on the activities and achievements of various government departments within Khawzawl district were delivered by SDO Pu Chandrakant Bagoria where he highlighted that Mizoram is regarded as the happiest state in India and is a state with 100 percent literacy.

title: UNION MINISTER OF STATE FOR CONSUMER AFFAIRS, FOOD & PUBLIC DISTRIBUTION HOVIN SAWRKAR HMALAKNATE THLIRLETNA LEH SAWIHONA MEETING NEI
content:
558/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 15th May, 2026:Vawiin chawhnu khan Union Minister of State for Consumer Affairs, Food and Public Distribution Pi Nimuben Jayantibhai Bambhaniya hovin DC Conference Hall-ah sawrkar hmalakna hrang hrangte thlirletna leh sawihona meeting neih a ni. He meeting-ah hian Khawzawl DC Pu K. Vanlalthiana leh department hrang hrang hotute an tel a ni.

Minister chuan Mizoram chu ram mawi tak a nih thu leh mipuite pawh an felin boruak pawh a thianghlim thu a sawi a. Prime Minister Pu Narendra Modi-a kaihhruaina hnuaiah sawrkar laipui chuan hmasawnna leh hamthatnate hi India rama khaw tin, chhungkaw tin leh mitinte hnenah thleng se a duh thu a sawi a. Sawrkar laipui chuan India ram hmarchhak (North-east) state-te a ngaihpawimawh thu leh hmasawnna ruhrel din kawngah leh mipuiten hamthatna an dawn theih nan chak takin hma lak zel a tum thu a sawi bawk a.  Pi Nimuben Jayantibhai Bambhaniya sawrkar scheme hnuaiah lo neitu tamzawkin hmathatna an dawn theih nan hmalak ni se a ti a, hemi atan hian awareness neih a pawimawh thu leh ram hmasawnna turin thalaite an pawimawh thu a sawi bawk.

Khawzawl DC Pu K. Vanlalthiana chuan Union Minister of State-in Khawzawl a lo tlawh avanga lawmthu sawiin, DC Bangla-a cultural programme leh chawhlui buatsaihah kalkhawmte tel vek turin a sawm a. SDO Pu Chandrakant Bagoria hnen atangin Khawzawl district chhunga sawrkar department hrang hranga hmalaknate thlirho a ni a. Mizoram chu India ram state hrang hrang zinga mi chengte hlim berna state (happiest state) a nih thu leh ziak leh chhiar thiam za a za awmna state a nih thu te a tarlang.

title: UNDER THE LEADERSHIP OF PRIME MINISTER SHRI NARENDRA MODI, OUR GOVERNMENT AIMS TO BRING DEVELOPMENT TO EVERY VILLAGE, EVERY FAMILY, EVERY REGION, AND EVERY CITIZEN: UNION MINISTER NIMUBEN BAMBHANIYA | NORTHEAST STATES ARE GAINING A NEW DIRECTION OF DEVELO
content:
83/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 15th May, 2026 :During her official visit to Khawzawl district today, the Union Minister of State for Consumer Affairs, Food and Public Distribution, Smt. Nimuben Jayantibhai Bambhaniya, stated that the central government's resolve under the leadership of Prime Minister Shri Narendra Modi is inclusive development. She emphasized that the government's primary goal is to bring progress to every village, every family, every region, and every citizen. The Minister stressed that the development of Northeast states is a special priority for the Modi government, which remains fully committed to delivering infrastructure and social welfare schemes to the last person.

During her tour, Smt. Bambhaniya first inspected National Highway 6 and issued directives to NHIDCL officials regarding road construction and timely maintenance. Following this, she visited KVK Khawzawl, where she praised the innovations in the agricultural sector and extended special congratulations to the five local farmers who have been honored with national awards. She also suggested organizing larger agricultural exhibitions in the future to enhance the knowledge of school children.

To strengthen the food security system, the Minister inspected the PDS godown at Kawnzar and the Fair Price Shop at Electric Veng. During her visit to the shop, the Minister engaged in direct dialogue with beneficiaries to verify the effective use of digital authentication for food distribution. She further emphasized the necessity of maintaining adequate monsoon stocks to ensure the smooth and uninterrupted availability of food grains for the community.

While reviewing health services, she inspected the laboratory constructed under Ayushman Bharat (PM-ABHIM) at the District Hospital and discussed the process for the early commencement of the Jan Aushadhi center. Finally, she visited the Anganwadi Centre at Electric Veng and Little Flower Primary School, where she met with teachers and students, reiterating the government's priority to create an excellent and barrier-free learning environment for children.

title: Haulawngah 40 Days Healthy Lunglei Campaign hnuaiah hriselna chungchang inzirtirna leh hriselna dinhmun endikna buatsaih a ni
content:
557/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Ṭomir thla ni 15:Vawiin khan Hausiampa Hall, Haulawngah 40 Days Healthy Lunglei Campaign hun hman niin, hriselna chungchang leh LushAI Healthy Lunglei App chungchang inzirtir a nih bakah, a thlawnin kal khawmte hriselna dinhmun endiksak an ni.

YMA Haulawng Branch President Pu C. Lalngaizuala'n hun kaihruaiin, Lunglei Sub-Deputy Commissioner Pu Lalruatfela'n 40 Days Healthy Lunglei Campaign chungchang a sawi zau va. Sawrkar aṭanga hma lakna ṭha tak tak awm ṭhin chu a dawngsawngtu mipuite'n ṭangkai taka hman thiam a ṭul thu sawiin, Civil Hospital Lungleiah Health ATM dah a nih thu leh a thlawna hriselna endik theihna a nih angin mipuite pawhin chhawr ṭangkai zel se ṭha a tih thu a sawi a. Hriselna kaihhnawiha tih tur leh tih loh turte ṭha taka zawm tur leh LushAI Healthy Lunglei App chu hman ṭangkai tum ṭheuh turin kal khawmte a chah.

Primary Health Centre (PHC) Haulawnga Medical Officer Dr PC Lalrinmawii chuan natna inkai chhawn theih loh (non-communicable disease) chungchang te, NCD laka inven dan leh nunphung hrisel neih pawimawhna te, hriselna atana tih tur leh tih loh tur hrang hrangte power point presentation hmangin a zirtir a. Data Entry Operator Pu K. Hmingthanmawia'n LushAI Healthy Lunglei (LHL) App chungchang sawi fiahin, application hman dan a takin a zirtir bawk.

He hunah hian Vanva Group huam chhunga YMA member-te bakah, kum upa lam leh zirlai mi 104 an kal khawm a. Medical Team te'n health screening buatsaih chhunzawmin, mi 83 te hriselna dinhmun endik a ni a. Kal khawmte hian a hmunah LushAI Healthy Lunglei App chu an mobile phone-ah an dah lut (install) nghal bawk.

40 Days Healthy Lunglei Campaign kalpui chhung hian YMA branch hrang hrang leh college-ah te hriselna dinhmun endikna (health screening) te, hriselna leh LHL App chungchang inzirtirna leh intihsiakna te buatsaih ṭhin a ni dawn a. Ni 40 chhunga campaign zawh hnuah App download tam leh hmang ṭhate hnenah lawmman siam tum a ni.

LushAI Healthy Lunglei app hmang hian district chhunga sawrkar damdawi in leh health centre-a daktawrte ṭhut hun tur a en theih bakah, OPD-a inentir turin appointment a lak lawk (book) theih a. ABHA-a inziah luhna te, he app-a inziak lut damdawi dawr (pharmacy)-te aṭanga damdawi chah theihna te awmin, hriselna lama hriat tur pawimawh hrang hrangte pawh awlsam takin a hmuh theih a. OPD appointment laknaa pui thei tur leh zawhna hrang hrang Mizo ṭawnga chhang thei tur AI chatbot dah tel a ni bawk a. Android hmangte tanhttps://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.lushaihealthylunglei.androidaṭangin leh iOS hmangte tanhttps://apps.apple.com/in/app/lhl/id6755673586aṭangin download theih a ni.

title: H&TE Minister Dr Vanlalthlana'n Mizoram Engineering College (Pukpui) chei ṭhat mek, Mizoram State University hmunpui leh Govt J. Buana College campus hmun tur leh Mizoram Polytechnic Lunglei te a tlawh
content:
556/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Ṭomir thla ni 15:Vawiin khan Mizoram sawrkara Higher & Technical Education (H&TE) Minister Dr Vanlalthlana chuan Lunglei Pukpuia Mizoram Engineering College (MEC) chei ṭhat mek te, Serkawn Meltea Mizoram State University (MZSU) hmunpui tur leh Government J. Buana College (GJBC) campus hmun tur ruahman te leh Theiriata Mizoram Polytechnic Lunglei (MPL) hmunhma te tlawhin, an dinhmun a enfiah.

Minister hi Lunglei West bialtu MLA Pu T. Lalhlimpuia bakah, H&TE Joint Director Prof. Benjamin Lalrinsanga leh thawktu dangte, official leh political party hruaitute'n an ṭawiawm a. MEC leh MPL a tlawhnaah hian MEC & MPL Principal Er Lalnuntluanga hovin thawktute'n lo dawngsawngin, Govt J. Buana College tur hmunhma ennaah hian Principal Pi Lalthangmawii Chhangte hovin thawktute'n an lo dawngsawng bawk a. Hma lakna kal mekte thlir hovin, hmabak leh hmachhawp hrang hrangte an sawi ho.

Minister Dr Vanlalthlana chuan MEC chu a building sak pum nan cheng vaibelchhe 26 sen a nih thu sawiin, tuna a taka zirna kalpui thei tura Mizoram sawrkarin a chei ṭhatnaah hian a sakna aia tam sum sen a nih tawh thu a sawi a. Luah theih tura chei ṭhat ngai – kawng siam, eng leh tui pekna, a ruhrel thawm ṭhat, a chung far leh tui put tihphui, kawngkhar, tukverh leh darthlalang thlak, rawng hnawih thar leh hmanraw hrang hrang lei tur ruahmanah 60% vel chu zawh fel a nih tawh thu sawiin, hmabak hmanrua leh bungraw lei bakah, thawktu lak chungchangah pawh inbuatsaih leh hma lak chhoh zel a nih thu a sawi a. Ram rohlu tur a nih angin a taka hman theih hun nghahhlelhawm a tih thu sawiin, Chief Minister bakah, Lunglei MLA-te leh H&TE Department-a thawktute, Minister dang leh hma lakpuitu department danga thawktute phurpuina leh thawhpuinaah lawm thu a sawi a. Rin aia chei ṭhat ngai a lo tam avangin a hautak hle tih sawiin, kum 2026–2027 session atan zirna kalpui ṭan thei turin theih tawp an chhuah thu leh department pahnih –Civil Engineering leh Computer Engineering-ah seat 30 ve vea bul ṭan tum a nih thu a sawi a. AICTE aṭanga final permission la ngaihchan mek a nih thu sawiin, hmabak la awmte pawh chak taka bawhzui a nih tur thu a sawi.

Lunglei West MLA Pu T. Lalhlimpuia chuan Lungleia MEC kalpui ṭan a ni tur chu a lawmawmin, Mizoram pum tan bakah chhim lam tan pawh hmasawnna rahbi pawimawh tak a ni dawn tiin, Chief Minister, H&TE Minister leh hotu dangte duhsaknaah leh department-a thawktute ṭhahnem ngaihnaah lawm thu a sawi a. MEC chu ram tana ro tling a nih angin Lunglei mipuite pawhin neitu thinlung pu a, uluk, dimdawih leh duat taka enkawlpui turin a ngen.

Minister leh MLA te hian MEC chei ṭhat hna thawh meka kawng siam leh a building thawm ṭhat hna thawh mek bakah, a chhung bungraw lak khawm tawhte an enfiah a. MZSU hmunpui tur atana ram ruahman leh GJBC campus hmun tur ruahmanna en bawkin, PM-USHA hnuaia GJBC campus tur chhunga cheng vaibelchhe 2.98 senga Women Sports Centre sakna tur hma lak ṭan mek an en nghal bawk a. A hna hi RMS Construction te'n thawkin, thla 18 chhung (November 2027 hma)-a thawh zawh tur a ni.

MEC building hi Rashtriya Uchchatar Shiksha Abhiyan (RUSA) hnuaia sum hmuh cheng vaibelchhe 26 sengin April 22, 2016-ah sak ṭan niin, November ni 16, 2018-ah sak zawh a ni a. Prime Minister chuan February ni 3, 2019 khan ral aṭanga hawng tawhin, harsatna hrang hrang avangin zirna kalpui ṭan theih lohvin a awm a. A taka zirna kalpui thei turin building sak zawh tawh thawm ṭhat ngai leh a panna kawng siam ṭhatna leh mamawh hrang hrang atan Mizoram sawrkar chuan nikum 2025 khan SASCI hnuaiah cheng vaibelchhe 28.03 dahin, hma lak chhoh mek a ni.

Mizoram Engineering College-ah hian building ding lai 8 - Academic Block, Administrative Block, Workshop/Laboratory, Library, Boys Hostel, Girls Hostel, Cafeteria leh Students Common Room te a awm a. Sawrkarin a thawm ṭhatna tur cheng vaibelchhe 28.03 a ruahman chu kawng (approach road) siamna atan cheng nuai 1,012 (MPWD kutah), tui pekna leh dah khawlna (water supply & storage) atan cheng nuai 249.44 (PHED kutah), eng pekna leh transformer bunna atan cheng nuai 106.36 (P&ED kutah) leh H&TE kutah campus tihchangtlunna te, hmanrua leh bungraw hrang hrang leina atan cheng nuai 1,435.39 dah a ni a. Tun dinhmunah P&ED leh PHED te hna hi zo tawhin, PWD hna hi 40% an zo tawh a. H&TE aṭanga Campus chei ṭhat hna (physical work) hi 40% vel zawh tawh niin, hmanrua leh bungrua eng emaw zat chah thlen a ni tawh a, a ṭul ang ang chak taka bawhzui mek a ni bawk.

H&TE Minister hian MPL pawh tlawh nghalin, thawktute'n MPL dinhmun leh mamawh hrang hrangte an lo thlen a. MPL hmunhma fang kualin, chei ṭhat leh tihchangtlun ngai laite an en ho bakah, National Highway kawng laihna kawng ko min vanga Girls Hostel leh building ṭhenkhat dinhmun him lo leh luah ngam lohva awmte thlir hovin, hma lak dan tur an en ho bawk.

H&TE Minister chuan Mizoram sawrkar hotute'n MPL chu an vei thu leh a tihchangtlunna tur ruahmanna eng emaw zat kalpui a nih thu a sawi a. MPL Computer Lab atana computer 100 lei tur te, MPL chei ṭhatna tur te, thawktu indaih lohna hnawh khat tur leh hma thar lakna tur hrang hrangte pawh ruahmanna siama bawhzui mek a nih thu sawiin, an mamawh hrang hrang an thlente pawh a theih anga bawhzuipui zel an tum thu a sawi.

MPL hi kum 1981 khan Civil Engineering nen bul ṭan niin, tunah hian department 4 – Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering leh Computer Science & Engineering te a awm tawh a. MPL aṭanga zir chhuak 80–90% chuan hna an hmu tawh niin thawktute chuan an sawi.

H&TE Minister Dr Vanlalthlana hian nimin tlai khan Lunglei Government College-ah Lunglei Government College leh Government J. Buana College zirtirtute leh thawktute nen inkawm hona hun an hmang bawk a. He hunah hian college pahnih tihchangtlunna tur leh zirna tihhmasawnna kawnga hma lakna kal mek leh hmachhawp hrang hrangte an sawi ho.

Mahni hriselnate ngai pawimawh tura chahin, Hnahthialah ringawt pawh Healthcare Scheme hnuaiah hian damlo enkawl nan a thlawnin cheng 91 chuang man an hman tawh thu tarlangin la in register ve lo te pawh lo ngaihven ve thuai turin a chah nghal a ni.

MUP Office hawn thar hi Bazar Veng, Pu C. Lalfakzuala building chung zawk niin luah man hi MLA Fund atanga pek a ni dawn a. Hei bakah hian upate intihhlimna tur - TV, Carrom Board leh thil dang dangte MLA hian hlan nghalin WiFi, Tui leh Gas connection-te pawh tih fel nghal vek a ni bawk.

Hawnna programme hi Pu F. Aithuama, MUP Sub Headquarters Hnahthial President chuan kaihruaiin Pu Kawlhmingliana, MUP Sub Headquarters Hnahthial Vice President chuan lawmthu sawiin hun a khar a ni.

title: NMBA HRISELNA KUTPUI KHARNA HUN HMAN A NI
content:
554/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 15th May 2026:Ni hnih awh NMBA Hriselna Kutpui chu vawiin chawhnu khan, a kharna hun DC Pisapui hall, Serchhipah hman a ni. Kut kharna inkhawm hi SDO (Sadar) Pi Rebecca Laldinmawii Hrahsel-in a kaihruai a, Deputy Commissioner Pu Paul L. Khuma chuan Khuallian niin hun a hmanpui.

Serchhip Deputy Commissioner Pu Paul L. Khuma chuan NMBA-Hriselna Kutpui huaihawt a nih chhan a sawi a. Serchhipa Doctor indaih lohna avanga mipuite’n harsatna an tawh thinte, chhawk zangkhaina tura he NMBA-Hriselna Kutpui hi buatsaih a nih thu sawiin, tih hlawhtlin a nih theihna tur atana hun leh tha sengtu zawng zawngte chungah lawmthu a sawi a, he hun hmanga kalkhawm mipui leh zirlai rualte chu khua leh tui tha, rilru leh taksa hriselna ngai pawimawh mi nih tum theuh tur leh mi dangte tana malsawmna ni tura nun kawng dik zawh theuh turin a fuih a ni.

NMBA-Kharna inkhawmah hian he Kut puala buatsaih Inter-School Public Speaking Competition-a ti thate hnenah lawmman sem niin, an hun hlu tak senga mipuite rawn theih tura rawn thu chhuak Doctor-te hnenah Serchhip Deputy Commissioner chuan lawmman thilpek a hlan bawk a ni.

Inter-School Public Speaking Competition hi Serchhip District chhunga High School leh Higher Secondary School zirlaite tana buatsaih niin, School hrang hrang 10 atangin zirlaite an intihsiak a, a pumpuiah Samuel Lalramchhana, Millenium High School, Chhiahtlang chu pakhatna niin, Lalhunmawii, Brilliant Higher Secondary School, Serchhip chu pahnihna ni a, R. Lallianpuia, Sainik School, Chhingchhip chu pathumna a ni. Lawmman latute hnenah hian tangkafai leh Certificate pek an ni. Sub Deputy Commissioner Pi Lalchhanhimi’n lawmthu sawiin hun hi a khar a ni.

NMBA-Hriselna Kutpui hi mipuite’n an hlut hle a, Serchhip Doctorte bakah Aizawl atangin natna hrang hranga thiam bikna nei Doctor rualte chahchhuah niin, a ni khatnaah (14th May) inentir tura hming ziak mi 672 awmin, a ni hnihna-ah mi 789 zet an awm a ni.

title: MIZORAM’S NEW NCC GROUP HEADQUARTERS OFFICE INAUGURATED; OFFICIAL SOCIAL MEDIA HANDLES LAUNCHED
content:
82/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 15th May, 2026:Today, Director General of the National Cadet Corps (NCC), Lt. Gen Virendra Vats,YSM, SM, VSM, virtually inaugurated Mizoram's new NCC Group Headquarters Office located at Level 2, New High Court Parking Complex, MINECO. The event was attended by Sports & Youth Services (SYS) Department Director Shri H. Lalhmingthanga, SYS Deputy Director Smt. Jennifer Chongthu, DDK Aizawl Director (News) Shri Nampibou Marinmai, NCC Mizoram Group Commander Brig GS Arora, 23 Sector Assam Rifles DIG Brig Pushpendar Sorayan, and other invited dignitaries.

Addressing the inauguration ceremony, Lt. Gen Virendra Vats expressed his gratitude to the Government of Mizoram, Brig GS Arora, and the cadets of the Mizoram NCC Group. He highlighted that good infrastructure strengthens the efficiency and effectiveness of any organisation and nation, and expressed happiness that the Mizoram NCC Group now possesses such infrastructure, which would further accelerate development in Mizoram as well as the entire Northeast region. Continuing his address, Lt. Gen Virendra Vats remarked, “We cannot look East by overlooking the Northeast,” and encouraged the NCC cadets of Mizoram Group to make the NCC programme more aspirational and inclusive by involving more youths and enabling them to experience unity amidst diversity.

Lt. Gen Virendra Vats emphasized the importance of Hardware, Software, and Manpower functioning together effectively in changing times. He noted that the Mizoram NCC Group now has good infrastructure (Hardware) in place, and it is time to focus on the development of Software and Manpower. Sending his best wishes to the Mizoram NCC Group, Shri Virendra Vats expressed his keen desire to visit Mizoram at the earliest opportunity.

During the inauguration ceremony, NCC Mizoram Group Commander Brig GS Arora also officially launched the Instagram and X (formerly Twitter) accounts of the NCC Group Headquarters, Aizawl. In his brief address, Brig GS Arora stated that this is just the beginning and that there is still a lot of work to be done in Mizoram. He also pledged that they would give their utmost effort in all their future endeavors.

The inauguration function commenced with an invocation led by Rev Samuel Lalrinsanga, and NCC Alumni, Achiever Cadets, and award winners from the North Eastern Region were also felicitated during the event. The event concluded with a vote of thanks delivered by Brig GS Arora.

BRIEF HISTORY OF NCC

The National Cadet Corps (NCC) was established in India on 15 July 1948 under the NCC Act of 1948. Its motto is “Unity & Discipline.” NCC aims to instill self-discipline among students from a young age and nurture them into responsible, capable, and service-oriented citizens and leaders for society and the nation. NCC units are established in various schools and colleges, and participation is open to both male and female students studying in high schools, higher secondary schools, and colleges.

In Mizoram, the NCC was established in 1964. Currently, there are 4 Battalions: three based in Aizawl—20 Mizoram Bn NCC, 1 Mizoram Bn NCC, and 1 Mizoram Air Squadron NCC—and one based in Lunglei—2 Mizoram Bn NCC. These various battalions were previously under the Silchar Headquarters. However, under the NCC expansion plan, the Government of Mizoram issued a sanction letter on January 18, 2024, to establish an NCC Group HQ in Aizawl. The process of raising the Group Headquarters commenced in July 2025, and officers designated for the headquarters started joining from July 2026 onward. On 29 January 2026, Chief Minister Shri Lalduhoma unveiled the Group Headquarters flag, and on 30 January 2026, Mizoram Governor General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh officially inaugurated the NCC Group Headquarters at Aizawl.

The office operated temporarily at the Sports & Youth Services Department Building in MINECO from October 25, 2025, to May 14, 2026. With today's development, Mizoram will have a permanent NCC Group HQ office under the direct command of a Brigadier.

title: FOUNDATIONAL LEARNING STUDY (FLS) 2025 – 2026 NEIH A NI
content:
553/2026-2027

15th May, 2026:Vawiin khan Mizorama district zawng zawnga sikul thlan bik 118-ah Foundational Learning Study (FLS) 2025-2026 neih a ni. He large-scale, system-level assessment hi national level-ah chuan PARAKH, NCERT-in kengkawhin, State leh UT level-ah SCERT, DIET leh Samagra Shiksha ten an kengkawh a ni.

FOUNDATIONAL LEARNING STUDY (FLS), 2026 hi Mizoram district tina thlan bik sikul 118-a Pawl 4 zirlai sikul naupang 1214 ten an chhang a ni. Sikul thlan bik 118 zingah hian English-medium sikul 60 leh Mizo-medium sikul 58 an tel. He Foundational Learning Study 2026 bei tur hian Rampum huapin state/ut 36 a district 776 atangin sikul 10,000 leh sikul naupang 1,00,000 te thlan an ni. Survey-ah hian Foundational Literacy (Mizo/English) leh Foundational Numeracy (Mathematics) ah Competency Based Question an chhang.

National Education Policy (NEP) 2020 chuan kum 2026 – 2027 hmain rampuma pawl 3 naupang zawng zawngten foundational literacy and numeracy a nei ngei tur a ni a ti a. He recommendation tihlawhtling tur hian Ministry of Education (MoE), Govt. of India chuan July, 2021-ah NIPUN Bharat Mission dinin a tihlawhtling tur leh kengkawh turin March, 2022 khan NCERT kutah a dah a.

Foundational Learning Study (FLS) hmasa ber chu 23 – 26 March, 2022 khan rampumah sikul 10,000 atangin Pawl 3 zirlai naupang 86,000 ten an lo chhang tawh a, sikul-te hi government sikul te, govt aided sikul te, private recognise sikul te leh central government sikul te a huam a ni. He Survey-ah hian Mizoram chuan Foundational Literacy-ah 59, Foundational Numeracy-ah 49 score in kumin survey-ah chuan hei aia score sang hi beisei a ni.

Foundational Learning Study hian a tum ber chu naupangin chhiar an thiam dan (oral reading fluency) chin leh nambar an thiam dan (numeracy skill) chin enfiah a ni a. FLS hmasa zawk, FLS 2022 kha baseline assessment angin paper leh pen (OMR-based) hmanga chhan tir an ni a, a tum hnihna FLS 2026 erawh hi chu digital platform-ah tablet hmanga chhan tir an ni thung a ni.

Foundational Learning Study 2026 result hi Performance Grading Index (PGI) 2.0 ah sengluh tur niin, State leh UT te Education-a an dinhmun leh rank teh nana hman a nih tawh dawn bawk avangin a pawimawh hle a ni.

Foundational Learning Study – 2026 hi National Level Trainer-cum-Observer Pi. Bobita Thakur, Samagra Shiksha, Himachal Pradesh leh Dr. Lalduhawmi Thomte, Joint Director, SCERT & State Level Coordinator for FLS – 2026 te kaihhruaina hnuaiah kal pui a ni.

552/2026-2027

Dated Hnahthial, the 15th May 2026 :

Vawiin khan District Rural Development Office (DRDO) Conference Hall, Hnahthialah Lok Sabha MP, Pu Richard Vanlalhmangaiha kaihhruaiin South Tuipui bialtu MLA, Pu Jeje Lalpekhlua nen Development Coordination and Monitoring Committee (DISHA) neih a ni a. Hnahthial District chhunga Head of Office hrang hrangte chuan Meeting-ah hian FY kum 2025-26 chhunga an hmalakna te report-in an hmachhawp pawimawh zualte an tarlang a ni.

Lok Sabha MP, Pu Richard Vanlalhmangaiha chuan DISHA member leh sawm bikte chu he hun ngaipawimawha an rawn kalkhawm avangin an chungah lawmthu a sawi a. DISHA meeting hi District chhunga hmalaknate thlir letna a nih mai piah lamah District kal zel dan tur thlir hona pawimawh tak a nih avangin District tan chuan meeting pawimawh berte zinga mi a nih thu sawiin mipuite tana tha tur anga ngaih chu infinchhuah hreh lo turin kalkhawmte chu a chah nghal a ni.

South Tuipui bialtu MLA, Pu Jeje Lalpekhlua chuan MP chungah lawmthu sawiin District hrang hrang ngaipawimawh a, District hmalaknate hre chiang tura a hmunah ngeiah a rawn tlawh thin chu fakawm a tih thu a sawi a. Hnahthial chu India rampum huap pawh a District hmasawn ber pawl an nih thu tarlangin faina lamah erawh tan an lak lehzual a tul thu a sawi.

Meeting-ah hian Hnahthial District-a Department hrang hrang-ten kum 2025-26 chhunga Central Scheme hnuaia an hmalakna leh harsatna langsar zualte chu a hnuaia mi ang hian an tarlang:-

Agriculture & Farmers' Welfare Department:Central scheme hrang hrang 11 hnuaiah hma lak mek a nih thu tarlan niin training pawh buatsaih nual a nih tawh thu tarlan a ni a. Bana Kaih Scheme hnuaiah May ni 14, 2026 thleng khan sawhthing quintal 6622.97 tan support price ₹1,74,84,367 chu pek chhuah a nih tawh thu leh support price ₹ 1,20,93,060 (quintal 3884.83)  chu la pek chhuah tur a awm thu tarlan a ni bawk.

Animal husbandry & Veterinary Department:Central Scheme Pathum – RGM, LH&DCP leh NLM hnuaia hmalakna te thlir ho niin May ni 8, 2026 thleng khan ran 220 insured tawh a nih thu tarlan a ni.

Horticulture Department:MIDH hnuaia an hmalak tawhna leh NABARD hnuaia an hnawthawh thlen chin tawh te tarlan a ni.

Krishi Vigyan Kendra:KVK lam hian an hmalakna te tarlan mai piah lamah Lunglei leh Hnahthial District-in KVK hran an mawmawhna te an tarlang a. KVK ram fencing that pawimawh thu tarlan a ni bawk.

Lead District Manager:PMMY, PMJDY, Social Security Schemes, PMEGP, KCC, Handholding, PM Visahwakarma leh NRLM hnuaia loan leh enrolment neih dan te tarlan a ni.

NHIDCL:Hnahthial Bypass road, 6.99 km a sei chu zawh fel thawkhat a nih tawh thu tarlangin MP chuan National Highway hmun hnih, Thiltlang leh Pangzawl kawng chhe zual lai te chu ngaihven vat turin a hrilh a ni.

Social Welfare Department:NSAP hnuaiah 2025-2026 4thQuarter chhung khan cheng nuai 46 release a nih tawh thu tarlan a ni.

UD&PA :Rotlang ‘E’ ah Rs. 1,97,51,160 estimate hmanga Solid Waste Management Centre sak hna thawh mek a nih thu tarlan niin SASCI hnuaiah storm drain siam hna thawh mek a nih thu tarlan a ni a. Hei bakah hian khawpui tihfai leh cheimawi hna hrang hrang thawh mek a nih thu tarlan niin Green Space/Park siam tuma ruahmanna siam a nih thu tarlan a ni bawk.

Hemi hnu hian KVK Khawzawl a tlawh a, exhibition stall ama puala an lo buatsaih chu lawmawm a tih thu leh lian tham zawk leh school naupang pawhin an chhim theih tura buatsaih ni thei se tiin thurawn a pe a. title: SOCIAL WELFARE MINISTER-IN HULHLIAP SHORT STAY CENTRE KHARNA HUN HMANPUI
content:
550/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 15th May 2026:Vawiin khan Hulhliap Short Stay Centre atanga chhuakte tana a thlawna Skill Training kalpui mek chu Lianchhiari Run, I&PR Department-ah kharna hun hman a ni a. Social Welfare, Women & Child Development Department (SW&WCD) Minister Pi Lalrinpuii chuan khuallian niin, he training-a zir chhuakte chu certificate semna hun a neihpui.

Minister chuan he Hulhliap Skill Training programme atanga zir chhuakte chu a lawmpui thu a sawi a, an thiamnate chu tipung zel tur leh an kal zelna turah duhsakna a hlan bawk a. Internet khawvela cheng kan nih tawh avangin kalkhawmte chu social media hmanga an thiam thilte an phochhuah thiam a pawimawh tih Pi Lalrinpuii chuan a sawi a. “Midangte nena thawhho thiam hi a pawimawh a, in hnathawh zelnaah pawh rinawmna vawng nung zel chungin taima takin thawk zel ula, chuti chuan hlawhtlinna pawh in chang ngei ang”, tiin kalkhawmte chu fuih a ni.

Pi Lalrinpuii chuan Synod hnenah lawmthu sawiin, Neihbawia an camping centre-te phal taka sawrkar an hmantirna leh an thawhpuina zawng zawng chu ropui a ti a. Hulhliap Short Stay Centre-a Skill Training an kalpuinaah mi 188 laiin an zir zo tawh chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Sawrkar chuan ruihhlo ngaite chhawmdawl chu a ngaih pawimawh thu leh anmahni hmasawnna tur atana dawm kan zel a tum thu a sawi.

He hunah hian SW&WCD Commissioner & Secretary Pi Lalzarmawii chuan thu sawina neiin, he hun hlu tak a hmanpui thei chu lawmawm a ti a. He Hulhliap Skill Training-a an thil zirte chu mahni kea din theihna hmanrua a nih thu leh chhungkaw chawmna atan pawha hman tlak a nih thu a sawi a. He an thiam thil (skill) zir chhuah chu an damchhung daih a nih thu leh midang pawhin he training hi chhim ve thei se a duhsakpui a ni, tiin Pi Lalzarmawii chuan a sawi a. Eizawnna ngelnghet tak nei thei tura an thiam thil zir chhuah chu an hman theih a beisei a ni.

Vawiin programme hi Mizoram Youth Commission (MYC) Chairman leh Hulhliap Core Committee member ni bawk Pu Malsawmzuala Ralte chuan a kaihruai a. Mizoram Synod Revival Department Director leh Task Group (Aftercare, Skill Training & Handholding, Hulhliap-SSC) member ni bawk Rev J.C Lalramliana chuan hunserh a hmang a. SW & WCD Additional Secretary leh Task Group Convener ni bawk Pu Lalnunhlua chuan lawmthu sawina hun neiin programme hi a khar a ni.

Hulhliap Short Stay - Aftercare, Skill Training & Handholding course hi May ni 4 atanga ni 15 thleng khan neih niin, he training-ah hian skill pathum Assistant Electrician(Batch 5-na), Aluminium Fabrication (Batch 4-na) leh Basic Food Processing (Batch 3-na) te tan zirtirna neih a ni.

title: RUIHHLO DO AWARENESS LEH KOLASIB DISTRICT FAINA CAMPAIGN DIAKKAWN YMA HALL-AH HMAN A NI
content:
549/2026-2027

Kolasib, 15th May, 2026:Vawiin khan Diakkawn YMA Hall, Kolasib-ah Kolasib Deputy Commissioner Pu H. Dolianbuaia hovin Ruihhlo do awareness campaign leh Kolasib District faina kalpui dan tur chungchang ah hun hman a ni.

He hun kaihruaitu Kolasib DC chuan khawtlang hmangaihtu leh a khua leh tui mi tak tak ruihhlo do tura an kalkhawm chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. He hun hi ruihhlo ngaite chhanchhuah hna leh ruihhlo tihreh dan tur ngaihtuah ho tura hman a nih thu a sawi. He ruihhlo beihna hi hmangaihna, duhsakna leh tih tak takna nen hmalam thlira thatho taka kalpui a ngaih thu a tarlang bawk. Sawrkar hnathawk tam tak chu insawn leh mai tur an nih avangin, khawtlang aiawh lo kalkhawmte chu anmahni khua ngei ruihhlo laka a fihlim theih nana nasa lehzuala tang turin a chah bawk.

Nu leh pate chahin DC chuan, fa fel tak nei te pawhin midangte vangin an tuar thei a, chuvang chuan 'kei chu ka fate an fel' tia tha thlah mai lova khawtlang tana thawh ho a ngaih thu a sawi. Zu vangin mi tam takin nunna an chan tawh a, a bikin mipa an thih hnem em em thu sawiin, "Tun hun hi i hmang tangkai ang u, i thawk ang u," tiin kalkhawmte chu a sawm a ni.

He hunah hian kalkhawmte hnen atangin ngaihdan hrang hrang ngaihthlak a ni a. Mipuiah inzirtirna a la that tawk loh thu leh do tumna tak tak kan neih a ngaih thu sawilan a ni a. Ringtu kan ni angin Isua nena kan do a ngaih thu leh, a tam thei ang ber sikul (school level) ah te awareness kalpui nise tih rawtna te a awm bawk a ni.

Kolasib Superintendent of Police (SP) Pu Lalrinpuia Varte pawhin thu sawiin, ruihhlo ngaite duh dan dana man emaw hrem mai a harsat thu a sawi a. Hremna dan chu NDPS Act-ah a awm a, chumi kengkawhtu tur pawh chu mi ruat bik leh sawrkar notification hrana chhuak an ngai a ni, a ti. NDPS Act hnuaiah hian ruihhlo man zat hi small, medium leh commercial tiin then a ni a. Gram 5 vel man chuan hremna pek nat duh viau mah ila kum khat aia tam an tang thei lo a, gram 250 (commercial quantity) ah erawh chuan a tlem berah kum 10 an tan a ngai thung a ni, a ti. Quantity tlem te man sak phei chu dan hian hremna ai mahin chhanchhuah (rehabilitation) ngai an nihna lam a hawi zawk a ni, a ti bawk.

Asst. Commissioner of Excise & Narcotics pawhin thu sawiin, ruihhlo man dan kalphung (procedure) felfai tak kalpui a ngaih thin thu a sawi a. Engtik lai pawhin ruihhlo kaihhnawihah chuan anmahni biakpawh leh koh theih reng an nih thu a tarlang.

He hunah hian ruihhlo vanga natna hlauhawm darh zel dan tarlan a ni a. Tun hnaia mi 6169 endik atangin HIV vei mi 74 (1.20%) hmuhchhuah an ni a. Heng zinga 58 hi mipat hmeichhiatna atanga kai niin (2 hi homosexual an ni), mi 12 in inchiuna hriau atangin an kai a ni. Nikum financial year chhung khan district chhungah damdawi (ruihhlo) vanga HIV kai mi 395 hmuhchhuah an ni. Kum 2002 atanga kumin January thlengin inchiuna hriau atanga HIV kai hi mi 647 an awm tawh a ni. Tarlan danin, HIV kai atanga 60% te hi mipat hmeichhiatna atanga kai an ni a, 36% te hi inchiuna hriau thianghlim lo hman atanga kai an ni.

Ruihhlo dona kawnga hmalak dan tur hetiang hian rel a ni a, ruihhlo dona kawnga thawk tha ber Village Council leh YMA Branch hrang hrangte inelna buatsaih nise an ti a. Chanchinbu lam pawh ruihhlo dona lam ziak tha te hnenah lawmman pek nise tiin an rel bawk.

Hemi hnu hian faina chungchang programme hman chhunzawm a ni a. Faina leh Solid Waste Management chungchanga hriattur pawimawh te Pi Lalrinchhani, SDC chuan PowerPoint presentation hmangin a tarlang a , kalkhawmte atangin kolasib khaw faina tur atana an ngaihdan hrang hrang an thawhkhawm bawk.

Vawiina he hun hmanah hian Kolasib khaw chhunga zirtirtute, Kolasib khaw chhunga VC member zawng zawngte, tlawmngai pawl hrang hrang aiawhte,  Kohhran hruaitute leh MJA Kolasib District te an tel a ni.

CEO chuan Electoral Roll-a dik lo leh fello awm theite enfiahna kawngah official te chuan uluk taka hma an lak tur thu a sawi a. Party hrang hrangte thawhhona pawimawhzia sawiin, vote neihna list dik leh tha neih hi election felfai leh rintlak neihna atan a pawimawh thu a sawi bawk. SIR ah hian kum 2005-a Mizorama Intensive Revision lo neih tawha Electoral Roll leh kum 2025 electoral roll chu enmil a nih thu a sawi a. Kum 2005 E Roll-ah hian voter 5,59,123 awmin kum 2025 E-Roll ah hian voter 8,75,004 an awm thung a. 2005 leh 2025 E-Roll enmila, E-Roll a hming chuang te leh an thlahte mapping tihhlawhtlin zat chu vawiin thlengin 80.54% a ni tawh a, mapping hi neih mek a nih avangin ni tin a pung zel a ni, a ti.

Dr. Lalrozama chuan kar tharah hian District tinah DEO ten Enumeration Form (EF) an print anga, hei hi ni 3 chhunga peihfel tura beisei an nih thu a sawi a. He Enumeration Form nen hian May 30 - June 28, 2026 chhungin BLO te chu in (household) tinah vawi thum aia tlem lo an kal dawn a ni tih a sawi a. Hemi hun chhung hian in lama biak theiha lo awm hram turin CEO chuan mipuite a ngen bawk. Enumeration Form thehlut lo te chu draft roll-ah an hming a chuan dawn loh avangin CEO chuan Enumeration Form thehluh hi ngai pawimawh turin mipuite a chaha, hemi kawngah hian Party hruaitute pawh thu thehdarh kawngah tan la lehzual turin a chah a ni. CEO chuan District tinah ‘Help Desk’ neih tum a nih thu sawiin, DC tinah BLO leh BLA te chu mipuiin awlsam zawka an zawhna leh harsatna te an thlen theihna turin kalpui tum a ni, a ti.

CEO official website ceo.mizoram.gov.in chu hmang tangkai turin CEO chuan mipuite a chah a. He website-ah hian voter list (electoral roll) enna, voter registration, voter ID (EPIC) chungchang enfiahna, polling station hriatna, form hrang hrang download-na leh election notification pawimawhte Mizoram mipuite tan hmuh theih leh hman theihin a awm tih a sawi a. Hemi mai bakah CEO chuan mobile app -ECINET download turin mi tinte a ngen a. He app hmang hian kum 2005 Intensive Revision ah voter ten an hming a chuan leh chuan loh an en thei a. BLO phone theihna te, complain thehluhna te, application thlen chin chhuina (track)-na te leh thil dang tam tak atan a chhawr tangkai theih a ni, a ti.

Joint CEO Pi Ethel Rothangpuii chuan CEO Office chuan September ni 16 2025 khan Political Party zawng zawng (recognized National & State Party) te hnenah Polling Station tinah Booth Level Agent (BLA) ruat tura ngenna a tihchhuah tawh chu ngaipawimawh lehzual turin Party hruaitute chu a chah a. BLA mawhphurhna leh pawimawhzia sawiin, Electoral Roll buatsaihna kawngah anmahni bialtu Booth Level Officer (BLO) bakah Electoral Registration Officer (ERO) leh Assistant Electoral Registration Officer (AERO) te tanpuitu an ni, a ti a. India khua leh tui dik tak Electoral Roll-a hming chuang thei tawh phawt chu hmaih awm lova ziah luh an nih theih nan leh Electoral Roll a chuang lo tur ziah luh an nih loh nana endiktu pawimawh tak an ni, a ti. Politcal Party in BLA an ruat ten ni khat chhungin Enumeration Form 50 aia tam lo an thehluh theih tur thu leh BLA ten claims and objections phase laiin form hi 30 aia tam lo an thehluh theih tur thu a belh bawk. AAP hian BLA an la inruat lo a; BJP -294, INC-1045, MNF-868 leh ZPM -1223, an vaiin BLA 3430 ruat an ni tawh a ni.

Vawiin meeting-ah hian CEO Office atang CEO Dr. Lalrozama, Joint CEO Pi Ethel Rothangpuii, Deputy CEO Pu James Miahlung, Assistant CEO Pi F. Lalnisai leh SIR Media Nodal Officer Pi Lalnunmawii te an tel a. Mizorama Recognised National Party leh State Party hruaitute hrang hrang bakah Registered Unrecognised Political Party hruaitute an tel a ni.

title: Mizoram puala din NCC Group Headquarters Office thar hawnna leh Social Media handle tlangzarhna nei
content:
547/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 15th May, 2026:Vawiin khan National Cadet Corps (NCC) Director General Lt. Gen Virendra Vats, YSM, SM, VSM chuan Level 2, New High Court Parking Complex, MINECO-ah Mizoram puala din NCC Group Headquarters Office thar chu ralkhat aṭangin biakhmuhtheihna (video conferencing) kaltlangin a hawng a. He hunah hian Sports & Youth Services (SYS) Department Director Pu H. Lalhmingthanga, SYS Deputy Director Pi Jennifer Chongthu, DDK Aizawl Director (News) Pu Nampibou Marinmai, NCC Mizoram Group Commander Brig GS Arora, 23 Sector Assam Rifles DIG Brig Pushpendar Sorayan te bakah sawm bik mi pawimawhte an tel a ni.

NCC Group Headquarters thar hawnna inkhawmaah hian Lt. Gen Virendra Vats chuan Mizoram sawrkar chungah te, Brig GS Arora chungah leh NCC Mizoram Group cadet-te chungah lawmthu a sawi a. Hmasawnna ruhrel (infrastructure) tha hian khawiah pawh hmalatute leh ram hruaitute hnathawh a tih chak theih thu a sawi a, Mizoram NCC Group pawhin chutiang hmasawnna ruhrel tha a nei ve ta hi lawmawm tiin Mizoram leh hmarchhak bial pumpui tana hmasawnna thlentu tur a nih thu a sawi bawk. Lt. Gen Virendra Vats chuan thu sawi chhunzawmin, 'Hmarchhak bial kan ngaihthah a nih chuan khawchhak lam kan thlîr thei lo vang', tiin, Mizoram NCC Group cadet-te chu NCC programme hi mi tin huapzo zâwk, thalai tam zâwk telna a nih theih nan leh hnam hrang hrang lungrual taka an tel tlan theihna a siam turin a fuih a ni.

Lt. Gen Virendra Vats chuan hun inthlak danglam zêlah hian Hardware, Software, leh Manpower te tha taka an kaltlan a pawimawh thu a sawi a. Tunah chuan Mizoram NCC Group hian Hardware lam a nei tha tawh a, a dawt lehah chuan Software leh Manpower hmasawnna lam hawi a hun tawh thu a sawi bawk. Pu Virendra Vats chuan Mizoram NCC Group-te hnenah a duhsakna hlanin, a hma thei ang bera Mizoram tlawh ngei a chak thu a sawi bawk a ni.

Vawiin office hawnna inkhawm ah hian NCC Mizoram Group Commander Brig GS Arora chuan Aizawl-a NCC Group HQ te Instagram leh X account a tlangzarh nghal bawk a. Thuchah sawi nghalin Brig GS Arora chuan hei hi a bul tanna chauh a la nih thu leh Mizoram-ah tih tur tam tak an la neih thu a sawi a. Hemi bakah hian an thil tihna apiangah theihtawp an chhuah zel dawn tih a tiam bawk a ni.

Vawiin office hawnna inkhawm ah hian Rev Samuel Lalrinsanga'n hunserh a hmang a; NCC Alumni-te, Cadet tithate (Achiever cadets), leh North Eastern Region-a lawmman dawngtute chawimawina hlan an ni a. Brig GS Arora'n lawmthu sawiin hun a khar a ni.

NCC CHANCHIN TLANGPUI

National Cadet Corps (NCC) hi NCC Act, 1948 hmangin July ni 15, 1948 khan India ramah din niin, an motto chu ‘Unity & Discipline’ (Inpumkhatna leh Inthununna) tih a ni a; naupangte’n zirlai an nih lai atanga mahni inthunun theihna an neih theihna tur te, hmahruai kawngah leh ram leh khawtlang tana mi tangkai leh chhawrtlak an nih theihna tur tea inchher hriamna niin, School leh college hrang hrangahte NCC unit din a ni a. High School leh Higher Secondary School zirlai bakah College kal lai, mipa leh hmeichhia, a duh apiangte tan zawm theih a ni.

Mizoramah chuan NCC hi kum 1964 khan din a ni a, tun dinhmunah Batallion-4 awmin Aizawlah battalion pathum - 20 Mizoram Bn NCC; 1 Mizoram Bn NCC leh 1 Mizoram Air Squadron NCC te awm mekin, Lungleiah battalion pakhat - 2 Mizoram Bn NCC a awm bawk a ni. Heng batallion hrang hrangte hi Silchar Headquarters hnuaiah an awm thin a; amaherawhchu, NCC tihlenna (expansion)plan hnuaiah Mizoram sawrkar chuan January ni 18, 2024 khan Aizawlah NCC Group HQ din turin sanction letter a tichhuak a. Hmalak chhoh nghal niin Group HQ din hna hi July 2025 khan tan a ni a; HQ-a thawk tur officer-te chuan July 2026 atangin an zawm tan a ni. January ni 29, 2026 khan Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma chuan Group HQ flag a tlangzarh a, a tuk January ni 30, 2026 khan Mizoram Governor General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh chuan Aizawl-a NCC Group HQ hi a hawng a ni.

MINECO-a Sports & Youth Services Department Building-ah October ni 25, 2025 atanga May ni 14, 2026 thleng khan an awm lailawk a. Tunah chuan Brigadier thutchilhin Mizoramin NCC Group HQ office nghet a awm tawh dawn a ni.

title: MLA Pu Ramthanmawia MZP Headquarters Champhai zirlai titha chawimawinaah khuallian
content:
546/2026-2027

Dated Champhai, 15th May 2026:MZP Headquarters Champhai chuan vawiin khan Zirlai titha an chawimawi a, Pu Ramthanmawia, East Tuipui bialtu MLA chuan khuallian niin hun a hmanpui a, Pu Er. H. Vanlalmawia, SDO PHE chu khualzahawm a ni.

Khuallian Pu Ramthanmawia chuan thu sawiin chawimawi phute chawimawia an awm leh chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin theihtawp chhuah sak thintu an chhungte leh an zirtirtute chungah lawmthu a sawi a. Zirlaite chu an hlawhtlin chhan chu Pathian a nih thu hre reng turin a chah a, Pathian an hriat a, an tih tlat chuan an tum emaw tum lo emaw hlawhtlinna a pe ngei ngei dawn tih a sawi a, ni phak ve lo tura an inngaihah pawh hlawhtlinna a pe thin, tih a sawi bawk.

Thalaite chu eirukna leh hlemhletna laka fihlim turin a chah a, an zirnaah a ni emaw, sawrkar hna an thawh hun a ni emawah pawh dikna tan tlat ni tur leh sum thianghlim lote chu hnawl zel ngam turin a chah a, kan ram hian eirukna leh hlemhletna a do a, a hnualsuat hunah Mizoram hi a dam dawn a ti a, chu chu Pathian thuawihna niin chu chuan chhungkaw hmuingilna a thlen thin a, sum neih kher a ni lova, chhungkua damna leh hriselna te a lo thleng thin, a ti.

Zirlai chawimawi takte chu zirna sang zawk an kal leh zelna turah thahnem ngai thara, an zirnaah pawh rinawm tak leh taima taka lehkha zir zela, mi hlawhtling ni tur leh ram leh hnam tana mi rinawm leh innghahna tlak nia hlawhtling turin duhsakna a hlan a, Champhai atanga mi hlawhtling tam tak lo chhuak tawhte hnung zui ngei ngei tura an rilru ti paukhauh turin a fuih bawk. Zirlaite chu social media hman danah fimkhur turin a fuih a, tangkai taka hman theih a nih laiin a tha lo zawnga an hmang a nih chuan an tan thil pawi tak thlentu a ni dawn tih a sawi a, a tha zawnga an hman erawh chuan an zirna atan hmasawnna mai bakah Pathian an hriatna kawng atana hmanraw pawimawh tak a nih theih thu a sawi a, an nun fimkhur taka hmang a, sang tak thleng turin duhsakna a hlan a ni.

He hun hi Govt. Champhai College Multipurpose Hall-ah hman niin Jehova Hriatrenga, Vice President chuan a kaihruai a, Rev. Vanlalnghaka Jongte, BCM Bethel Pastor Bialtu chuan hunserh a hmang a, K. Lalruatfela, Secretary hnen atangin report ngaihthlak a ni bawk. Khualzahawm Pu Er. H. Vanlalmawia, SDO PHED bakah H. Lalruatdika, President te hnen atangin thusawi ngaihthlak a ni bawk.

He hunah hian Chikim Group te'n Awareness an neih bakah GNM School te'n Special Item an nei bawk. H. Lalramchuana, Fin. Secretary kaihhruainain HSLC leh HSSLC zirlai tithate chawimawina hun hman a ni a, HSLC ah zirlai 97 chawi an ni a, an vai hian Distinction-a pass vek an ni. title: SOCIAL WELFARE, WOMAN & CHILD DEVELOPMENT MINISTER PI LALRINPUII’N PANIC BUTTON PROMOTIONAL VIDEO A TLANGZARH
content:
544/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 15th May, 2026:Vawiin khan Social Welfare, Woman and Child Development Minister Pi Lalrinpuii chuan a pisaah hmeichhia leh naupang te himna atana Panic Button Passenger phur motor zawng zawnga vuah chu mipui nawlpui ten an hriatthiam theihna tur video, Mizoram State Commission For Protection of Child Rights leh Women & Child Development te buatsaih chu a tlangzarh.

Minister chuan Vehicle Location Tracking System Project lo chhuah dan sawiin, Nirbhaya Case avanga sawrkar laipuiin hmeichhia leh naupangte himna atana hmalakna a nih thu leh, sawrkar laipui chuan hemi lamah hian tha pawh a seng nasa em em tih a sawi a. Mizoram pawh Christian ram ni siin POCSO Case sang em em te, woman helpline in phone call an dawng tam em em reng chu a pawi a tih thu sawiin, hmeichhia leh naupang te himna atana hetiang ang hmalakna a awm hi lawmawm a tih thu a tarlang a. Mizoram sawrkar hnuaia thawktu hrang hrang Women and child development te, Transport department leh Mizoram State Commission for Protection of Child Rights te tangho a, hmalakna pawimawh tak a awm chho ta chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Emergency Button Monitoring Center-te leh Response Team-te, Police lam te inpekna chu lawmawm tiin, Panic Button chu mi tam thei ang berin an lo hmelhriat a, a mamawhtu leh hmang tangkai tur ten a hun taka an hman tangkai theuh theih nana promotional video thehdarh kawngah mi zawng zawng theihtawp chhuah theuh turin a sawm a ni.

Transport Department Director Er. Pu R.Lalrammawia chuan Vehicle Location Tracking System (VLTS) chu a sawifiah a. VLTS hi Sawrkar laipuia Ministry of Road Transport and Highways in October 25, 2018 a order a chhuah zulzui a hmalakna niin, October 2022 atang khan Mizoram sawrkar pawhin hma a lak tan thu a sawi a. Command and Control Center pawh September ni 15, 2023-ah hawn a lo ni tawh tih tarlangin, Ni 22 August 2023 leh September 23, 2024 khan notitication chhuah a ni. Passenger phur chi motor reng reng Taxi, Maxi cab, Bus leh Rental-ah te VLT khawl vuah lo leh tinung lo chuan Motor Registration a tihtheih tawh dawn lo a. Motor hluiah pawh, January ni 1, 2019 hnua lei ho chu order chhuah atanga thla 12 chhungin VLT Device an vuah lo emaw, an tinung lo emaw a nih chuan re-registration/permit issuance/fitment a renew theih tawh dawn loh. Auto – Rickshaw leh 2-Wheeler Taxi te erawh chu hei hian a huam ve lo a ni. Tunah hian Mizoram chhungah Vehicle Location tracking Device activate passenger phur motor hi 2,284 a awm mek thu a sawi a ni.

Video tlangzarhnaah hian Women and Child Development Director, Pi Zoramthangi Chhangte leh Commissioner & Secretary, Pi Lalzarmawii te pawhin thu sawiin, Mizoram tana rahbi pawimawh tak a nih thu leh hmalakna chu tha an tih thu an sawi bawk a ni.

title: CHIEF MINISTER-IN KHAWZAWL SUB HQR. YMA INKHAWMPUI VAWI 2-NA HMANPUI
content:
541/2026-2027

Khawzawl the 15th May 2026:Vawiin khan Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma chuan Khawzawl Vengthar YMA Hall-ah Khawzawl Sub Headquarters YMA Conference vawi 2-na chu khuallian niin a hmanpui a. YMA member te chu khawtlang leh ram nuam siam tura thawhpuiah a sawm.

Pu Lalduhoma chuan, Khawzawl chu a khua ang maia a ngaih, mipuite pawh a unaute ang maia a en an nih avangin, an kianga awm nuam a tih thu a sawi a. Mahni awmna hmun theuha khawtlang nuam leh ralmuang siam zel tura fuihin, kawng tinrenga sorkar thawhpui turin a sawm.

Mizoten YMA kan nei hi kan nihlawh hle a, YMA anga mi zawng zawng huikhawm a, khawtlang thuiphui thei pawl hi ram dangah an awm ka ring lo hial. Chuvangin, YMA hi kan tan ram rotling a ni.

Kan thalai tam takten ruihhlo an ngaih avangin YMA hian kumpuanah “Ruihhlo Do” a hmang mek a. Sorkar pawhin ruihhlo hi kan do nasa a, a ngawlveite chhanchhuahna pawh kan kalpui a. Kan hmalakna tinrenga kan kutke pawimawh ber chu YMA in ni deuh zel a. In chungah kan lawm hle.

YMA hi Zo nun ze mawi tinrengte chhawm nunga, thangtharte hnena zirtirtu a ni bawk a. Tun hnaiah Mizoramin khualzin kan ngah hle a, min rawn tlawhtuten min fak fona pakhat chu kan Zo nun ze mawi tak tak an rawn hmuhte hi a ni. Nghahloh Dawr ringawt pawh hian an thinlungah thu a sawi nasa em em thin. Tunah chuan Zo nun ze mawi hi khualzinte hip thei khawpa mihring nun mawi a ni tan ta a. Ka zain i uar deuh deuh ang u. YMA pawh lo tang sauh sauh rawh u.

Thlai thar kan lei atanga chiang taka kan hmuh chu Mizoram khaw chhak lam hian thlai in tharchhuak tam tih hi a ni a. Mi taima in tam tihna a ni. Hma in sawn zel theih nan ruahmanna hrang hrang kan siam a. Tun kar Nilaini liam ta khan Sawhthing Unique Selling Proposition Project, cheng vaibelchhe 190 vel senna tur kan hawng a. Kan hawn tlaiah a processing unit dinna tur sum Rs. 30.13 Crore chu DoNER in an rawn sanction nghal a. Khawchhak lam bial zawng zawngte inhmantawm turin Champhai leh a chhehvelah kan din dawn a ni, a ti a. Khawzawl District chhunga sorkar hmalakna langsar zualte a tarlang bawk.

Ram hmasawnna hi remna leh muanna boruak hnuaiah chauh a kalpui theih tih tarlangin, remna leh muanna ngaihlu a, vawngtha tlat turin YMA member te a sawm a. Ramngaw leh Nungcha humhalhna kawnga tha taka hma an lak thin avangin lawmthu a sawi.

Vawiin vantlang inkhawm hi Pu Vanlalsawma Colney, Vice President, Sub Hqr. YMA in a kaihruai a, Tv. Lalrintluangan hunserh a hmang a, Prof. Malsawmliana, General Secretary, CYMA chuan YMA kumpuan "Ruihhlo Do" hmangin thusawina a nei a. "Rualtin khumtu YMA" tih hla leh hla dang tam tak phuahtu Pu V. Thangzama, nizana boral ta sunna hun an hmang bawk.

Khawzawl Sub Hqr huam chhungah hian Group YMA pali, Branch 42 an awm a. Member hi 19,899 an awm mek a ni.

title: MAMIT DISTRICT MAGISTRATE THUPEK CHHUAH
content:
540/2026-2027

Dated: Mamit the 15th of May, 2026:Mamit District chhunga Teirei Lui Bailey Bridge, Darlak chu a dawh kum/hun a rei tawh bakah a hmanrua te a chak tawk tawh lo a, phal chin aia rit motorin a zawh thin tih hriat a ni bawk a. Hemi vanga harsatna thleng thei lakah mipuite kan him theih nan leh Teirei Lui Bailey Bridge hi hman chhunzawm zel anih theih na turin khapna thupek chhuah tula hriat a ni a.

Chuvangin, Pu SUVIGYA S CHANDRA, IAS, DISTRICT MAGISTRATE, MAMIT DISTRICT chuan Section 163, Bharatiya Nagarik Suraksha Sanhita (BNSS), 2023 in thuneihna a pek angin a hnuaia mi ang hian khapna thupek a chhuah.

"Teirei Lui Bailey Bridge, Darlak hi Motor 26 Metric Tonnes aia rit in zawh phal a ni lo."

He thupek bawhchhetute chu Section 223, Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita (BNS), 2023 hmangin hrem theih an ni ang. He khapna thupek hian, hnuhlet emaw tih danglam a nih loh chuan, chhuah a nih atanga thla hnih (2) chhung a huam ang.
